recovery.title: Couldn't load settings
recovery.body: Your saved settings are corrupted and can't be read. Open the file to repair it by hand, or reset settings to defaults.
recovery.resetWarning: Resetting erases your saved providers and API keys. Your stories are not affected.

crashRecovery.title: Story recovered
crashRecovery.perTurnNamed: An interrupted shutdown was detected in {{storyName}}. Your last AI response was reverted to keep the story consistent.
crashRecovery.perTurnUnnamed: An interrupted shutdown was detected. Your last AI response was reverted to keep the story consistent.
crashRecovery.chapterCloseNamed: An interrupted shutdown was detected in {{storyName}}. The chapter-close pass was reverted; your story content is intact.
crashRecovery.chapterCloseUnnamed: An interrupted shutdown was detected. The chapter-close pass was reverted; your story content is intact.
crashRecovery.periodicClassifierNamed: An interrupted shutdown was detected in {{storyName}}. A background memory update was reverted; your story content is intact.
crashRecovery.periodicClassifierUnnamed: An interrupted shutdown was detected. A background memory update was reverted; your story content is intact.
crashRecovery.genericNamed: An interrupted shutdown was detected in {{storyName}}. An incomplete background update was reverted to keep the story consistent.
crashRecovery.genericUnnamed: An interrupted shutdown was detected. An incomplete background update was reverted to keep the story consistent.
